emails.subject: CA for NNG
emails.body: CA for NNG Attached is the CA for the project we discussed with NNG. Let me know when you want executable agreements.

emails.subject: RE: CA for NNG
emails.body: RE: CA for NNG Gerald, Thanks for the CA. I am working on getting Unocal's address for you. Attached is the draft Term Sheet for your review. Thanks, Lisa Druzbik 3-9620 To: Druzbik, Lisa; Kiani-Aslani, John

emails.subject: RE: CA for NNG
emails.body: I am fine with this term sheet.

emails.subject: RE: CA for NNG
emails.body: Thanks. Our Upstream team is meeting tomorrow on the term sheet and we will likely have a few changes prior to issuing to NNG. If so, I will forward it for your review either Friday afternoon or Monday morning. Thanks, Lisa
